ground_truth.title: 20 Best Gym Equipment Brands in 2025 (With Price Examples) - WodGuru
ground_truth.author: Aneta Niepytalska
ground_truth.main_content: Do you want to set up a gym? Will you soon be buying equipment and are wondering what equipment is the best? Or maybe you dream of one or two pieces of exercise equipment for your home? In both cases, we have a long list of the best fitness brands in 2025 for you today. Read the article and compare price, quality and opinions in the fitness equipment industry to make the optimal choice. There are many good brands in the fitness equipment industry, both for professional and home use. The prices of different pieces of equipment vary. One of the most expensive ones are Technogym's treadmills: $9,999. The cheapest pieces of equipment are TRX's suspension trainer that costs $200. If you want to start your gym, get familiar with the topic of gym management software. This tool will help you run your gym, save time and properly manage your customer base, employees, payments and attendance lists. The article covers 20 brands including: 1. Life Fitness - Renowned for high-quality cardio and strength training equipment with innovative designs and durable machines. Price range: $2,000 - $10,000. 2. Precor - Leader in personalized health and fitness experiences with advanced biomechanics and superior build quality. Price range: $3,000 - $9,000. 3. Cybex - Offers a range of cardio and strength training equipment tailored for performance with unique technologies like the Arc Trainer. Price range: $2,500 - $10,000. 4. Technogym - Premium fitness equipment with an emphasis on connectivity and design, integrating with wellness apps. Price range: $2,500 - $15,000. 5. Peloton - Revolutionized home fitness with interactive and community-driven workouts and engaging live classes. Price range: $2,000 - $4,500. 6. Sole Fitness - Offers reliable and well-built cardio machines with excellent customer reviews and solid warranties for home use. Price range: $800 - $3,000. 7. Bowflex - Innovator in home fitness with versatile and space-saving equipment. 8. NordicTrack - Known for high-tech features and interactive training programs. 9. Horizon Fitness - Offers quality cardio equipment at mid-range prices. 10. Matrix Fitness - Commercial-grade equipment for gyms and fitness facilities.

The prices of different pieces of equipment vary. One of the most expensive ones are Technogym's treadmills: $9,999.
